summary: Excellent UltraMatrix recording captures the magical, high‑energy first night of Hampton ’87 with crisp sound despite lacking a pure SBD.
review: The ultra‑matrix source recorded by Don Pearson and released by Charlie Miller delivers crystal‑clear audio that reviewers call the best available version of this show. The performance itself is described as off‑the‑hook, magical, with Jerry Garcia “back” and the whole band riding a wave of energy on the first night of the East Coast Spring Tour.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review praises both the musical performance and the ultra‑matrix recording quality, indicating an exceptional show and excellent audio despite no pure soundboard source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: UltraMatrix capture using ambient mics provides crisp, clear sound; considered the best source for this show even though a straight SBD is unavailable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First night of the East Coast Spring Tour delivered an off‑the‑hook vibe and magical performance throughout, with high energy from start to finish.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Back on stage and delivering thrilling playing as noted by reviewer
